title: Decision No 01/2024 of the Trade Committee of October 4th, 2024 modifying Appendix 1 to Annex XIII to the EU-Andean Countries Trade Agreement, as incorporated into and made part of the Trade Agreement between the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, of the one part, and the Republic of Colombia, the Republic of Ecuador and the Republic of Peru, of the other part
subject: TRADE
